@metadata.note: Source of truth: English. Translators work from this file. Keep short and ZID-forward — long explanations belong in docs, not in the UI.

header.buttons.add_function_title: Search Wikifunctions and pin a function to the sidebar
header.buttons.import_title: Import an existing Z14 composition into the workspace
header.buttons.run_title: Execute the composition via the Wikifunctions API
header.status.empty: No function shell declared — click "Declare function shell" or "Import" to begin.
shell_modal.title: Function shell
shell_modal.hint: The Z8 this composition implements. Arg keys become Z18 references of the form <functionZID>Kn.
shell_modal.confirm_clear: Changing the shell will clear the workspace. Continue?
shell_modal.invalid_zid: Function ZID must look like Z123 (got: $1)
import_modal.title: Import composition
import_modal.hint: Load an existing Z14 (or Z8's first impl). Referenced functions auto-fetch; shell auto-declares from Z14K1.
import_modal.json_label: Or paste JSON (Z2 wrapper, Z14, or bare composition):
import_modal.need_input: Provide a ZID or paste composition JSON.
import_modal.invalid_zid: "$1" doesn't look like a ZID (expected Z followed by digits).
import_modal.confirm_replace: Import will replace the current workspace. Continue?
run_modal.title: Run composition
run_modal.hint: Executes via wikilambda_function_call. Test values replace Z18 arg refs in-flight; nothing is written to Wikifunctions.
run_modal.no_args_subtree: This subtree doesn't reference any shell arguments — running as-is.
run_modal.no_args_workspace: No arg references in the workspace — running with no inputs.
export_modal.title: Exported ZObject
export_modal.hint: Paste into the Z14K2 slot of an existing implementation via the Edit Raw JSON userscript.
search_modal.title: Add function from Wikifunctions
search_modal.hint: Search the live catalog. Pin any function to the Pinned sidebar category.
search_modal.search_placeholder: Search by label, e.g. "filter claims" (optional with a type filter)
search_modal.zid_is_impl: $1 is an implementation (Z14) of function $2. Pin the parent function below, or use Import to load this specific implementation.
search_modal.zid_is_other: $1 is a $2, not a function. Only Z8 functions can be pinned.
fill_slots.title: Fill slots from test — $1
fill_slots.hint: Tests attached to $1 carry known-good inputs. Pick one to populate the block's empty (or shadow-default) slots.
slot_picker.title: Fill "$1"
slot_picker.hint: Slot expects $1. Compatible blocks below — any output-type match, or the universal Z1.
slot_picker.empty_filtered: No compatible blocks match that query.
peek.no_composition: Built-in or code-based implementation — no composition to show.
peek.is_z14: That ZID is an implementation (Z14), not a function definition.
peek.not_function: That ZID is $1, not a function (Z8).
error.no_root_block: No value block at the top level — drag a function or literal block onto the workspace.
error.multiple_roots: $1 top-level blocks. Compositions must have exactly one root — delete or nest the extras.
error.shell_def_empty: Function-definition frame has no composition body — connect a block to the 'body' slot.
